creator: ben.rubson@gmx.com
text:
Thank you HPS for your help.

I managed to have Mellanox ConnectX-3 drivers compiled into the kernel adding this to the GENERIC configuration :
options COMPAT_LINUXKPI
device mlxen

"options OFED" does not seem to be needed for ethernet purpose only.

Loading mlxen and mlx4 as .ko of course works, but I would like to have them compiled into the GENERIC kernel by default so that servers with these NIC only can easily boot the installation CD / live CD.

Do you then think that it could be possible to have these 2 configuration items added to GENERIC ?

Many thanks !

Ben
